name: Okuzumi Yuiko
description:
Yuiko Okuzumi (奥墨 ユイコ) is a character in Miru Tights.

Due to her beautiful appearance, Okuzumi is considered one of the most popular teachers in school. She's very enthusiastic about teaching and sometimes she crosses the line. Okuzumi wears a tight grey skirt suit and completes her look with a pair of glasses and high heels. She has shoulder-length brown hair and brown eyes. Her favorite tights are 20 deniers.
creator: vacdac
